deferred_to_manager: GPU multi-config forecast gate vs CPU-WRF (per-lead bias/RMSE) for the YSU/ACM2 PBL combos -- single GPU job; this sprint is CPU-only.
environment: JAX CPU only (cores 0-3); GPU multi-config forecast gate is MANAGER-scheduled (held by the v0.4.0 forecast gate).
objective: YSU(1)+ACM2(7) PBL: jax.lax.scan-traceable / vmap-batched rewrite of the host-NumPy single-column kernels + scan-wire into the operational forecast loop (GPU-operational), with NO parity regression.

parity_no_regression.note: Same predeclared tolerances as the pre-rewrite host-NumPy lane (tests/test_v060_pbl_{ysu,acm2}.py). The traceable rewrite reproduces the host-NumPy reference to 1.89e-15 max-abs across all 6 cases each (proofs/v060/pbl_trace_vs_host.py runs BOTH paths on identical savepoint inputs; kpbl + acm2 noconv match exactly), so traceable == host-NumPy == WRF. No clamp/mask/loosened tol.

rewrite.approach: 1:1 transcription of the host-NumPy reference into pure jnp / jax.lax: the non-local K-profile + counter-gradient terms are masked jnp.where ops; the bulk-Richardson PBL-height searches are jax.lax.scan with a frozen-on-stable carry / masked argmax; the implicit vertical-diffusion tridiagonals use a scan-based Thomas solver (YSU tridin_ysu/tridi2n) and the ACM2 TRI + bordered-band MATRIX solvers unroll over the static nz; the ACM2 data-dependent semi-implicit substep count nlp runs a fixed-max jax.lax.scan with per-column masking. No clamp/mask to force agreement. The host-NumPy reference (_ysu_numpy / _acm2_numpy) is retained for the cross-check only.

gpu_runnable.note: now genuine: the host-NumPy single-column path was replaced by the jit/vmap-traceable kernel and _resolve_operational_suite no longer fails closed.

scan_wire.momentum_coupling: A-grid PBL increment A2C-averaged onto the original C-grid faces (WRF add_a2c_u/add_a2c_v), mirroring the MYNN adapter; theta/qv direct on the mass grid.
scan_wire.operational_slot: runtime.operational_mode._physics_boundary_step_with_limiter_diagnostics PBL slot dispatches bl_pbl via coupling.scan_adapters.PBL_SCAN_ADAPTERS
scan_wire.surface_forcing: re-derived per-cell via the revised-MM5 surface layer (surface_layer_with_diagnostics): HFX/LH->qfx, psim/psih, bulk-Ri BR, U10/V10, ZNT, 1/L -- the same forcing the savepoint-parity kernel was validated on; no host transfer.

still_fail_closed_clean.noah_classic_sf_surface_2: needs WRF-faithful surface-forcing + 4-layer soil coupler (separate follow-up)
